A 200-Year Calendar: Many people have an interest in knowing upon what day of the week they were born. Others like to ascertain upon what particular day of the week fell a date of some event in the past, or upon what day of the week some occasion in the future will occur. To make it possible for Relief Society Magazine readers to ascertain these things for themselves this calendar, extending over two hundred years, is here given. The calendar extends from 1776 to 1978. Directions  Look for the year Mo. 1. you want in one of the columns of FEBKL'ARY. T 1F S S M:T W IT F ''a: ...'...!.. -I 1 1 2i 3| 4 the Index headed "Yr." Opposite 8 9:10 11 12113114 S M 11 21 3| 4 12 '13 14 15 16 21 3 17 the year is the number of the Calendar for that next year 19;20i21 18 26|27i28 5 6 71 8] 9 10 11 12 13 14 15 16 19,20 21 22|23,24|2o 17 18 5; 6 7' 8' 9 10. The Calendar 22|23pji25 29I30I31I... 261271281 ri: 19 20;21,22 23 26127 '28 29 30 24 3ll JUNE. itself, with the number over it, will MAY. be found below. 21 3 4 -I li 2| 3; 4 12 13 14; 15 147 158 169 10 11 12|13 17,18...|...|... 4 5 6... 7 8i 1, 92 103 11 112' 13 14^15 16 17 19 2021 21 22I23I24 25 26 19120 18 19 20, 21 122 23 24 23I24 16|17 2518 26 27128 25'26 27 28,29 30... Example  A person born on the 30l. J... 9 lO'U 28 29i30|31... 16th of June, 1825, wishes to find ACeCST. SEPTEMBER. ...I...| 1| 2| 31 4| 1 what day of the week his birthday 2 3 4 12 13 9 10111 16 17 18 1920 6 7 8 9;1011il: 13 14 15 16il7|18,19 10 Hll2 13 14 15 occurred. He finds 1825 in one of 30'3lL.. 23 24 2.5 20!21|22'23 24,25(26 17il8l 19120 28 21 2229 2S|29 30 31.. 24 25126 27 the columns headed "Yr." in the In OCTOBER. .NOVEMBER. DECEMBER. dex. Opposite 1825 in the column 11 2| 31 4 8 9;1011 13 14 121 131 14; 15 1617 18 3 4 3' 41 5' 6 7 8 headed "No." is the number 7. He 15 3031 "29 16'17'18... 20I21 27 28 104i:ui^,z 11 12 13 14 15 consults Calendar No. 7 and finds 22 23i24i25 27 28|29 309,10 19|20l2ll22 26.. 11 17|18 19 20 21 22 23,24 2o 24i25|26,27 28 29 the 16th of June came on Thursday.
